intro:
The doctor will see you now.
Get close, earn his trust, and unlock exclusive images!
description:
Check in to a hospital where the doctors are as intense as they are irresistible... and getting better has never felt this good.

Answer their questions, hold your ground against every interruption, and build a real connection with anime doctors who each carry something worth uncovering.

From the quiet specialist who says little but notices everything, to the confident attending who makes every visit feel personal. Every choice you make changes how they see you.

Think you can handle the pressure and win them over?


Features:

● DUAL GAMEPLAY, DOUBLE TENSION: Alternate between personality-driven Q&A sessions and reflex-based minigames where you block distractions, rival patients, and unexpected visitors to keep your connection alive.

● UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE IMAGES: Deepen your bond with each doctor to reveal special moments and unique illustrations as you progress through their route.

● DISTINCT PERSONALITIES, REAL DEPTH: Every doctor reacts differently to your answers, your timing, and your choices. Getting it right feels earned.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: How it ends depends on how well you listen, how fast you react, and how much you truly understand him.

● A HIDDEN FINAL MOMENT: Reach question 150 to unlock a very special scene that only the most dedicated patients will ever see.


This hospital runs on connection, and you are the missing piece.
Ready to find out which doctor steals your heart?
